projects.title: Tusome - Tutoring Android App
projects.description: Tusome is an Android-based tutoring application that connects two users through a unique session code. It supports real-time video calls, microphone communication, and secure authentication using Firebase.

projects.title: IT Support Web System
projects.description: A web-based IT support system designed to manage technical support requests, track hardware and software issues, and streamline IT operations.

projects.title: TechAssist Hub Mobile App
projects.description: A mobile tech support app where staff create support requests and admins assign them to technicians from the relevant departments.

projects.title: KAFU AI Website
projects.description: KAFU AI is a React website that shares information about Kaimosi Friends University, including offered programs, campus navigation, and a chatbot for answering student questions.

projects.title: StudentRedressal App
projects.description: StudentRedressal is a React Native mobile app where students submit complaints, admins assign them to staff, and the responsible teams resolve issues while giving clear feedback to students.
